## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Datagrid and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance, and future initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/rptXiSUmswPsKfMTdwdtRuvH3GyqGmDS?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content performance stable; 680 articles live by Saturday, new categories showing promise](https://fathom.video/share/rptXiSUmswPsKfMTdwdtRuvH3GyqGmDS?tab=summary&timestamp=80.0)
  - [Thiago eager to explore AI-generated content beyond blog posts (e.g., videos, podcasts)](https://fathom.video/share/rptXiSUmswPsKfMTdwdtRuvH3GyqGmDS?tab=summary&timestamp=1021.0)
  - [Plans to share sales call recordings for better understanding of customer needs/objections](https://fathom.video/share/rptXiSUmswPsKfMTdwdtRuvH3GyqGmDS?tab=summary&timestamp=622.0)
  - [Discussion on creating downloadable guides and sales enablement materials from existing content](https://fathom.video/share/rptXiSUmswPsKfMTdwdtRuvH3GyqGmDS?tab=summary&timestamp=967.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Update

  - [680 articles live by Saturday](https://fathom.video/share/rptXiSUmswPsKfMTdwdtRuvH3GyqGmDS?tab=summary&timestamp=286.0)
  - [Overall sessions holding steady for past 3 weeks; attributed to seasonal slowdown](https://fathom.video/share/rptXiSUmswPsKfMTdwdtRuvH3GyqGmDS?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Google traffic increasing, but decline in Gemini and Copilot referrals](https://fathom.video/share/rptXiSUmswPsKfMTdwdtRuvH3GyqGmDS?tab=summary&timestamp=323.0)
  - [New categories (AI agents for law, e-commerce, construction stats, manufacturing) showing good signs](https://fathom.video/share/rptXiSUmswPsKfMTdwdtRuvH3GyqGmDS?tab=summary&timestamp=347.0)
  - [Non-branded performance improving in impressions and positions](https://fathom.video/share/rptXiSUmswPsKfMTdwdtRuvH3GyqGmDS?tab=summary&timestamp=374.0)
  - [Top-performing clusters: finance, real estate, and legacy topics](https://fathom.video/share/rptXiSUmswPsKfMTdwdtRuvH3GyqGmDS?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)

### Website Revamp and Jobs-to-be-Done Exercise

  - [Website revamp expected next week; basic pages approved](https://fathom.video/share/rptXiSUmswPsKfMTdwdtRuvH3GyqGmDS?tab=summary&timestamp=524.0)
  - [JTBD exercise on hold due to challenges in identifying 10 representative customers](https://fathom.video/share/rptXiSUmswPsKfMTdwdtRuvH3GyqGmDS?tab=summary&timestamp=559.0)
  - [Alternative approach: analyze existing customer feedback, QBRs, and sales calls](https://fathom.video/share/rptXiSUmswPsKfMTdwdtRuvH3GyqGmDS?tab=summary&timestamp=592.0)

### Social Media and Content Repurposing

  - [Thiago to share agent with Raph's account for more efficient post creation](https://fathom.video/share/rptXiSUmswPsKfMTdwdtRuvH3GyqGmDS?tab=summary&timestamp=854.0)
  - [6 posts currently drafted, pending agent review](https://fathom.video/share/rptXiSUmswPsKfMTdwdtRuvH3GyqGmDS?tab=summary&timestamp=891.0)
  - [Discussion on repurposing blog content into other formats (podcasts, downloadable guides, videos)](https://fathom.video/share/rptXiSUmswPsKfMTdwdtRuvH3GyqGmDS?tab=summary&timestamp=1113.0)
  - [Thiago demonstrated AI-generated video content using Datagrid platform](https://fathom.video/share/rptXiSUmswPsKfMTdwdtRuvH3GyqGmDS?tab=summary&timestamp=1051.0)

### Future Content Initiatives

  - [Explore creating downloadable guides from top-performing blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/rptXiSUmswPsKfMTdwdtRuvH3GyqGmDS?tab=summary&timestamp=1432.0)
  - [Consider generating sales enablement materials addressing common objections](https://fathom.video/share/rptXiSUmswPsKfMTdwdtRuvH3GyqGmDS?tab=summary&timestamp=1548.0)
  - [Investigate potential for AI-generated multimedia content (videos, podcasts)](https://fathom.video/share/rptXiSUmswPsKfMTdwdtRuvH3GyqGmDS?tab=summary&timestamp=1113.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Thiago to share sales call recordings and transcripts for analysis](https://fathom.video/share/rptXiSUmswPsKfMTdwdtRuvH3GyqGmDS?tab=summary&timestamp=1622.0)
  - [GrowthX team to review shared content and develop recommendations](https://fathom.video/share/rptXiSUmswPsKfMTdwdtRuvH3GyqGmDS?tab=summary&timestamp=1504.0)
  - [Raph to revise social posts using Thiago's agent once access is granted](https://fathom.video/share/rptXiSUmswPsKfMTdwdtRuvH3GyqGmDS?tab=summary&timestamp=1518.0)
  - [Mara to share questions for next sync on Monday](https://fathom.video/share/rptXiSUmswPsKfMTdwdtRuvH3GyqGmDS?tab=summary&timestamp=1634.0)
  - [GrowthX to explore options for creating downloadable guides and sales enablement materials](https://fathom.video/share/rptXiSUmswPsKfMTdwdtRuvH3GyqGmDS?tab=summary&timestamp=1548.0)
  - [Follow up on Marcel's thoughts regarding AI-generated video content](https://fathom.video/share/rptXiSUmswPsKfMTdwdtRuvH3GyqGmDS?tab=summary&timestamp=1427.0)
